primary_operations.name: save
primary_operations.sdk_call: self._conn.execute('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO entities(id, payload) VALUES (?, ?)', (entity_id, payload)); self._conn.commit()

primary_operations.name: find_by_id
primary_operations.sdk_call: row = self._conn.execute('SELECT payload FROM entities WHERE id = ?', (entity_id,)).fetchone(); return bytes(row[0])

primary_operations.name: delete
primary_operations.sdk_call: self._conn.execute('DELETE FROM entities WHERE id = ?', (entity_id,)); self._conn.commit()

code_style_notes: sqlite3.Connection objects are NOT thread-safe by default; pass check_same_thread=False to share
always commit() after writes; sqlite3 opens an implicit transaction on the first execute
use ? as the parameter placeholder; never f-string user input into SQL
